titleStmt.title: SII 19.340: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 340. (A.R. No. 594 of 1904.) ŚRĪNIVĀSANALLŪR, MUSIRI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE WEST WALL OF THE KORAṄGUNĀTHAN TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records a gift of 10 kaḻañju of gold made up of 2 kaḻañju in cash and 4 buffaloes and a he-calf valued at 8 kaḻañju by Sattri Ramani wife of Valakkūṟṟaṉ Piḍāraṉ Kaṇḍaṉ of Iḷanagar in Kuṟunāga-nāḍu on the southern bank of the river, for the daily supply in lieu of interest thereon, of an āḻākku of oil for burning a lamp from dawn to dusk in the temple of Tirukkurakkutturaideva at Mahēndramaṅgalam a brahmadēya in Maḻa-nāḍu on the northern bank.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripaṉmaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 4Āvatu vaṭakarai
maḻanāṭṭu brahmadeya mahentramaṅkalattu tirukkurakkuttuṟai
devarkku teṉkarai kuṟunākanāṭṭu Iḷanakar valakkūṟṟaṉ piṭāraṉ kaṇṭaṉ maṇa
vāṭṭi cattri ramaṇiyeṉ Ittevarkku pakalviḷakkukku kuṭutta Erumai nālum
kiṭākkaṉṟu Oṉṟu Āka naṭai Āñcu tiruviḷakkinukku Immāṭṭāl vilaikaṇṭa po
ṉ 8� Eṇkaḻañcum � nta poṉ 2� Irukaḻañcum Āka poṉ
10� patiṉkaḻañcum kaḻañciṉavāyi � varaip palicaiyāl tiṅka
mañcāṭiyum Eḻumāviṉāl kaḻañcukku nāṟpatiṉāḻivaṇṇam Immañcāṭi
yum Eḻumāviṉāl vanta Eṇṇai Uḻakku kuṟaiya nāṉāḻi Ivveṇṇai nicatam Ā
ḻākkāka Udittavāṟe Eṟṟināl Asta�kkum Aḷavu(kkum maḷavu)m Erippatākavum
Ivarivarumaiyāl vanta poṉṉālum Ivaḷ tanta poṉ Irukaḻañcu Ākap pon
patiṉkaḻañcukkum palicaiyāl Ippakalviḷakku Erippomāṉom Ivvūr tiru
kkoyiluṭaiyom Idharmmam panmāyeśvararakṣai . Ittiruviḷakku Erippittā
ṉ śrīpādam vaitteṉ talaimellutu ..
Digital edition of SII 19.340 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
